title: PvP Menu panorama
description: Makes a panorama in Minecraft in the pvp theme, and adds splashes to the same theme.
body:
![pvp menu panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01660de9dc9207b2f84f8ee7ea51785810c0635d.png)

[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/spectrr3)
[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-menu-panorama/gallery)  
Makes PvP Menu panorama and splashes:
- Mace>cpvp
- Mace>all
- Булава>все киты
- iwtdie vs 20 
- gg lt4
- gg ez
- gl
- ItzRealMe prime  
And more!  
### PvPers **_(DM me in discord rat2x2 to add you to the panorama )_**:
- [Butilochnick](https://www.youtube.com/@Butilochnick)
- [ItzRealMe](https://www.youtube.com/@itzrealme7649)
- [Kasspov](https://www.youtube.com/@kasspov)
- [Asteroides](https://www.youtube.com/@Asteroides01)
- [iwtdie](https://www.youtube.com/@iwtdie)
- [ronyak3kk](https://www.youtube.com/@ronyak3kk)
- [Marlow](https://www.youtube.com/@Marlowww)
- [Lopovski](https://www.twitch.tv/lopovski_skyline)
## What for?  
I tried to collect all the memes and all the recognizable characters from pvp, but not only EU, but also CIS!
## Information:  
Pack version 1.15-26.1 Snaphsot 1 (but in version lower 1.20 resource pack it will be displayed as "Made for an oder version of Minecraft", I am aware of this, but I can't do anything.)
